leadText: Normalize (Japanese: ノーマルスキン Normal Skin) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV. It is the signature Ability of Skitty and Delcatty.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation IV 1.1.2 Generations V and VI 1.1.3 Generation VII onwards 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Normalize makes all moves (including status moves ) used by the Pokémon with this Ability become Normal-type instead of their usual type . If Normalize makes Thunder Wave a Normal-type move, Thunder Wave can affect Ground-type Pokémon; Thunder Wave can only affect Ghost-type Pokémon that are either holding a Ring Target or affected by Foresight or Odor Sleuth . If the move Flying Press is affected by Normalize, it deals Normal / Flying -type damage. If the move Freeze-Dry is affected by Normalize, it will still do super effective damage against Water-type Pokémon. If a Pokémon with Normalize is under the effect of Electrify or Ion Deluge , all of its moves become Electric-type rather than Normal-type. Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] Hidden Power , Weather Ball , Natural Gift , and Judgment are affected by Normalize. Generations V and VI [ edit | edit source ] Hidden Power , Weather Ball , Natural Gift , and Judgment are no longer affected by Normalize. Similarly, Techno Blast is unaffected by Normalize. Generation VII onwards [ edit | edit source ] Normal-type moves used by the Pokémon with this Ability now receive a 20% power boost (precisely, a factor of 4915/4096), except moves that cannot be affected by Normalize. This boost applies to both moves that are originally Normal-type and moves that become Normal-type due to Normalize. Multi-Attack , Terrain Pulse , and damaging Z-Moves are unaffected by Normalize. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Normalize has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Enables the Pokémon to use all of its moves as if they were Normal-type moves. B S L くりだすわざが すべて ノーマルタイプになる MD GtI Unavailable S MD All moves the Pokémon uses will be Normal type! MD RT DX All moves used by the Pokémon become Normal-type and deal more damage.
